title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Manufacturing Engineer with drive and ambition, Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises in Visakhapatnam is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises:
Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Petroleum International Enterprises!
